name: multi_field_single_message_profile
notes: One message carries name + business type + city + a years-in-business detail all at once, answering the pre-seeded business_type confirm AND (per VT-601 cross-fill: a descriptive >=4-word business_type answer fills a still-pending 'about' gap) the 'about' gap in the same turn. No later turn may re-ask any of those facts individually. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey --draft-type kirana --draft-city Nagpur` then `script <tenant> multi_field_single_message_profile.json`.

steps.message: We are Om Kirana Store, a grocery and daily needs shop in Nagpur — been running for 8 years now
steps.note: Name + business type + city + tenure, all in ONE message, as the answer to the pre-seeded business_type confirm. Expect the reply to move the conversation forward rather than asking for any of these facts individually.
Retention check: NONE of the facts just given (name / type / city / tenure) may be re-asked.
